ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "id" TEXT /* ID assigned by the data source */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the incident data (e.g., MapQuest) */,
  "tmc" INTEGER /* TMC (Traffic Management Center) code for the incident */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the incident (e.g., 1-4) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start date and time of the incident */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End date and time of the incident */,
  "start_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "start_lng" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "end_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the end location (if applicable) */,
  "end_lng" REAL /* Longitude of the end location (if applicable) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the incident (in miles) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location ID associated with the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., accident, road closure, congestion) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., ongoing, resolved) */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Entity or individual who reported the incident */,
  "response_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for handling the incident */,
  "estimated_impact" TEXT /* Estimated impact of the incident (e.g., delay time, affected vehicles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street name where the incident occurred */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the incident occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the incident occurred */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode where the incident occurred */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the incident occurred */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone where the incident occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "intersection" TEXT /* Intersection where the incident occurred */,
  "road_type" TEXT /* Type of road (e.g., highway, local street) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the weather record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the weather record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the incident (in Fahrenheit) */,
  "wind_chill" REAL /* Wind chill at the time of the incident (in Fahrenheit) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of the incident (as a percentage) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at the time of the incident (in inches) */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility at the time of the incident (in miles) */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of the incident */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of the incident (in miles per hour) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation at the time of the incident (in inches) */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition at the time of the incident */,
  "wind_gusts" REAL /* Wind gusts at the time of the incident (in miles per hour) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover at the time of the incident (as a percentage) */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index at the time of the incident */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point at the time of the incident (in Fahrenheit) */,
  "snow_depth" REAL /* Snow depth at the time of the incident (in inches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., traffic operator, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_codes" (
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each airport code */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the amenity */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., bump, crossing, give_way) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signals" (
  "traffic_signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the traffic signal */,
  "traffic_signal_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic signal (e.g., traffic_calming, turning_loop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signals_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sunrise_sunset" (
  "sunrise_sunset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sunrise/sunset record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the sunrise/sunset record */,
  "sunrise_time" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  "sunset_time" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sunrise_sunset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sunrise_sunset_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "twilight" (
  "twilight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each twilight record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident associated with the twilight record */,
  "civil_twilight" TEXT /* Time of civil twilight */,
  "nautical_twilight" TEXT /* Time of nautical twilight */,
  "astronomical_twilight" TEXT /* Time of astronomical twilight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("twilight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_twilight_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
